title: RvNxMango Community Modpack
description: The official Modpack for the RvNxMango Community Server
body:
# RvNxMango Community Server

This is the official Modpack for the RvNxMango Community Server!

This Modpack aims to improve the overall experience of the Player.


**Following Improvements were made:**
- Performance Improvements (Sodium, Sodium Extra, Ferritcore, Indium and much more)
- Visual Improvements (Distant Horizon, Iris, Shaders, Animations, Resourcepacks and much more)
- Audio Improvements (Ambient Sounds and an Overly complicated Sound Mod)
- QoL Improvements (REI, Better F3, Inventory Profiles Next, Jade, Chat Heads and much much more)

So thanks to:
